name: wp-lzer
description: Headless WooCommerce with WordPress, WPGraphQL, and Next.js

scripts.content:sync: npm run validate && make import-pages && make import-policies
scripts.db:backup: mkdir -p backups && docker exec wp-lzer-mysql mysqldump -u wordpress -pwordpress_secret wp_lzer > backups/wp_lzer_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.db:restore: gunzip -c $(FILE) | docker exec -i wp-lzer-mysql mysql -u wordpress -pwordpress_secret wp_lzer
